content.text: I attached a consult opp example.
We need a field added to consultation opportunities that is labeled “Scheduled by”.
The options in that field should be a drop down with the following: Self-Scheduled, Kershon Stephens, Margo Michel, Monica Lewis, Jemimah Aquino, Stephannie Opeda, Mariella Medina, Management, Other.

We have no way to distinguish appointments truly self-scheduled. When a calendly booking occurs, and the appointment syncs with SF as scheduled, it should at default mark this field as “Self-Scheduled”.
However, there should be the option to change this after to a different selection if there was manual intervention needed by one of the schedulers.

requestType.name: General Help Desk Request
requestType.description: Submit a Request or report and issue; fields below are based upon your selection.

status.description: This was auto-generated by Jira Service Management during workflow import
status.name: Escalated

content.text: to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.

updateAuthor.displayName: Earth Alberio

content.text: I can assign this task to our SF Admin and get the field created. However, getting it automatically set based on a Calendly booking will require the Dev team and will take a while. Is this useful if we add the field now but it isn’t set automatically? Or should the field not be added until the automation can be built? Just wondering how to route this and get at least part of it accomplished quickly.

updateAuthor.displayName: Danielle Cress

content.text: I would love to at least get the field created. I can then include the calendly automation for the field selection in any discussions we have upcoming for our various clinical projects with Nate + team.

updateAuthor.displayName: Sarah Phonthaphanh

content.text: That sounds like a great plan. I’ll pass this over to Sean to get the field created.

updateAuthor.displayName: Danielle Cress

content.text: The issue HEAL-33116 has been assigned to me. I’m taking a look now and will keep you updated as I make progress.
Let me know if there’s any additional context that might help.

updateAuthor.displayName: Sean Bingham

content.text: Added new Opportunity picklist field: Scheduled_By__c (label: Scheduled by) with values:
Added to the consultation/hormone evaluation Opportunity layouts near the existing scheduled date/time fields:
Sales - Retention Hormone Evaluation Page Layout

items.fromString:
I attached a consult opp example.

We need a field added to consultation opportunities that is labeled “Scheduled by”. 

The options in that field should be a drop down with the following: Self-Scheduled, Kershon Stephens, Margo Michel, Monica Lewis, Jemimah Aquino, Stephannie Opeda, Mariella Medina, Management, Other. 

We have no way to distinguish appointments truly self-scheduled. When a calendly booking occurs, and the appointment syncs with SF as scheduled, it should at default mark this field as “Self-Scheduled”. 

However, there should be the option to change this after to a different selection if there was manual intervention needed by one of the schedulers.
items.toString:
I attached a consult opp example.

We need a field added to consultation opportunities that is labeled “Scheduled by”. 

The options in that field should be a drop down with the following: Self-Scheduled, Kershon Stephens, Margo Michel, Monica Lewis, Jemimah Aquino, Stephannie Opeda, Mariella Medina, Management, Other. 

We have no way to distinguish appointments truly self-scheduled. When a calendly booking occurs, and the appointment syncs with SF as scheduled, it should at default mark this field as “Self-Scheduled”. 

However, there should be the option to change this after to a different selection if there was manual intervention needed by one of the schedulers.

Record Link:

[https://10xhealth.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Ql00000bJEWbIAO/view|https://10xhealth.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Ql00000bJEWbIAO/view|smart-link]

The options in that field should be a drop down with the following: Self-Scheduled, Kershon Stephens, Margo Michel, Monica Lewis, Jemimah Aquino, Stephannie Opeda, Mariella Medina, Management, Other. 
We have no way to distinguish appointments truly self-scheduled. When a calendly booking occurs, and the appointment syncs with SF as scheduled, it should at default mark this field as “Self-Scheduled”.

The options in that field should be a drop down with the following: Self-Scheduled, Kershon Stephens, Margo Michel, Monica Lewis, Jemimah Aquino, Stephannie Opeda, Mariella Medina, Management, Other.
